expectations.text: Both of S2's research questions are answered one-to-one (S2.RQ1 and S2.RQ2), neither left unanswered

S2.RQ1 is MISSING — recognizes that the existing getUserById looks up by id, not username, so no username lookup exists — and names a concrete extension point for adding one (e.g. in src/users/service.ts next to getUserById)
expectations.evidence: S2.RQ1 is classified as missing, distinguishes getUserById as id-based, and points to the user service as the extension point.

expectations.text: S2.RQ2 is MISSING — recognizes the existing routes (src/routes/account.ts) are authenticated/account-scoped, so no public profile route exists — and names where a new public unauthenticated route should be added to fit the routing structure
expectations.evidence: S2.RQ2 is classified as missing, cites the existing account route structure, and names a route extension point for a public profile route.

expectations.text: Findings cite file:line locations for the existing code referenced (getUserById, the account routes) rather than vague references
expectations.evidence: Findings cite file:line locations for getUserById and the account route structure.

expectations.text: No verbatim source code from the fixture is copied into the plan — only names and locations
expectations.evidence: No copied fixture source constructs such as function declarations, router calls, SQL calls, or interface bodies were found.

expectations.text: S2's status is updated to researched
